english: The Goddess placing the beauty of the moon in the lotus of her face
roman: Kantim vidhum mukha kamale viniveshya Devi

english: Her hip suggesting the heaviness of the ocean floor
Dwelling in the Shri Chakra, the meaning of all scriptures
roman: Shri Chakra raja nilayam sakala agamartham

english: I salute Tripura Shiva, sister of Mahesh, the auspicious one
The young one, bowed by the weight of her three-eyed beautiful bosom
roman: Balam trinetara vilasat kucha bhara namram

english: The fair Gauri born of the mountain lord, riding Garuda
The eternal one dwelling in the triangle, of the form of Pranava (Om)
I salute Tripura Shiva, sister of Mahesh, the auspicious one
This Lalita Panchakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Lalita Panchakam idam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

english: Becomes rich with all prosperity by the grace of Lalita
roman: Sarva sampat samriddhah syat Lalitayah prasadatah
